---
title: "Stat 184 Free Throw Analysis"
author: "Robert Dang, Connor Box, Aidan Wieners"
date: today
format:
  pdf:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: true
    colorlinks: true
execute:
  echo: false      
  warning: false  
  message: false
---

# Introduction

This report shows a reproducible data analysis of individual NBA player attributes and the effect they have on their free throw percentages (>= 150 attempts) using Quarto. All results (tables and graphs) are created directly from code, so anyone can run the file and get the same results. The goal is to clearly explain the data and any conclusions we can make from it.

# 



# Author Contributions
- Robert Dang: 
- Connor Box: 
- Aidan Wieners 

# Appendix: Code
